mnemonics: Cells In Systems Talk Directly With Experts
keyPoints: 5.1: Definition of Distributed Systems - A collection of independent computers that appear to be a single system to the users
5.2: Characteristics of Distributed Systems - Autonomy, Distribution, Organization, and Independence
5.3: Advantages of Distributed Systems - Scalability, Fault Tolerance, and Resource Sharing
5.4: Disadvantages of Distributed Systems - Complexity, Communication Overhead, and Security
5.5: Comparison with Traditional Systems - Size, Cost, and Performance
